channel.title: Chongquan's Blog RSS
channel.description: Blogs about engineering, building products, AI and practical notes.

item.title: Welcome to the blog
item.description: First post in the Astro blog and portfolio setup.

item.title: Build log February 2026
item.description: A compact changelog post showing timeline style writing and project checkpoints.

item.title: Static publishing pipeline from private source to public Pages
item.description: End-to-end notes on building in a private repo and publishing artifacts to a public GitHub Pages repository.

item.title: Markdown styling showcase for this Astro theme
item.description: A single article exercising headings, lists, code, quotes, tables, and media to validate visual polish.

item.title: Component layout notes and accessibility pass
item.description: Practical notes on spacing rhythm, card density, and semantic structure for responsive reading.
